- 12 Monthly detail of Medicaid long term supports and services(LTSS) status. January through December. I1 - Nursing Facility Service (NFS) Institutional (INST) LTSS
I2 - Other INST LTSS
C1 - Waiver Community (COMM) LTSS
C2 - Home Health (HH) or Personal Care Services (PCS) COMM LTSS
A - Non-LTSS; no such service use
Null - No Medicaid coverage during the month
